message:
🐛 Fix resource usage showing same percentages across clusters

Root cause: CPU and memory usage were hardcoded as 67% and 65% respectively
instead of using actual pod resource request data.

Changes:
- Add getPodMetrics() to kubectlProxy to fetch pod resource requests
- Add parseResourceQuantityMillicores() helper for CPU parsing
- Update getClusterHealth() to include cpuRequestsCores/memoryRequestsGB
- Update ResourceUsage card to use actual request data from clusters
- Update filteredClusters type to include request fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
